name: Dick Durbin
subject: We can't miss this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
In the next Senate, I hope to serve as the lead Democrat on the Judiciary Committee.
And if Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff flip Georgia on January 5 -- and we have a working Democratic majority in the Senate -- I'll be the chair of this powerful committee.
That means President-elect Joe Biden will have an important support system in the Senate to help move this country forward, reform our immigration system, and appoint competent judges.
**[We can't miss this moment, Peter. Will you pitch in $5 right now?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201218-georgia-judiciary?refcode=em201218i_1138&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
The Senate Judiciary Committee, which has usually been in the spotlight of every major debate and issue in America, in recent history has retreated to the back benches of Trumpism. I think it needs to be brought back into its rightful place when the Senate reconvenes in 2021.
That's why it's so important that we don't come up short in these must-win fights in Georgia.
**[Make a $5 contribution to help Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff turn Georgia blue.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201218-georgia-judiciary?refcode=em201218i_1138&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201218-georgia-judiciary?refcode=em201218i_1138&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff443a/42ab3cf4/66dec935/135ded52/2478898164/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff443a/42ab3cf4/66dec935/135ded53/2478898164/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: incredible news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Senator Murray said I could share some incredible news, friend:
Poll after poll has shown me running neck and neck with my opponent in our important runoff election.
Now, our people-powered campaign has pulled even -- **a brand new poll out of Georgia shows us ONE POINT ahead, 49.4% to 48.1%!**
But here's the bad news: special interests are now scrambling. On top of the millions of dollars already spent attacking me, outside special interests just pledged to pour in another **$100 MILLION** to crush our momentum.
Mitch McConnell and his special interests know that if we win in Georgia, they'll lose their grip on power in Washington. Plain and simple. That's why we're working hard to keep up the momentum, fight back against the attacks, and win this race.
But right now, we're coming up short. If we don't close this gap, my opponent could retake the lead when it matters most. So I have to ask:
******[Please, friend, will you rush a gift of $5 to my campaign and Patty Murray now to help us reach our grassroots goal and win this incredibly important election next month?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201218-warnock?refcode=em201218i_555&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thanks so much for pitching in what you can,
Raphael Warnock

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201218-warnock?refcode=em201218i_555&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
** **

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a69330b/22080b68/79c1c890/46022010/3463892034/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a69330b/22080b68/79c1c890/46022017/3463892034/VEsC/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Help Get Out The Vote for the Senate runoff races in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
America needs volunteers to Save America and Secure the Senate now! If Democrats win the two Senate runoff races in Georgia, they will control the Senate. This simply cannot be allowed to happen.

_The election is on January 5th, but Georgia is already sending out absentee ballots – the same kinds of ballots that were the cause of the election fraud in the Presidential election!_

**The good news is that you can help Get Out The Vote (GOTV) for the Senate runoff races in Georgia from anywhere in the country!**

There are three ways you can volunteer. You can print out and send letters to voters (we have a prewritten letter you can use), you can text message voters, and you can call voters. See below for details on how to sign up for each activity.

Newt Gingrich recently said that Republicans have to turn out more votes than Stacey Abrams can steal, and that’s where you can help. By reaching as many likely Republican voters as possible, we can turn out enough votes to stop the Democrats from stealing these two Senate seats.

If we fail, and they are able to steal or win these seats legitimately, and Joe Biden is allowed to steal the Presidency, then the Democrats will have total control over the entire federal government. This means court packing, statehood for Puerto Rico and D.C. (which means four new Democrat Senators), the Green New Deal, socialized medicine, giving America away to China, and more.

_You and I must stop all of that from happening._

**Will you join the fight and volunteer to Save American and Secure the Senate?**

**SEND TEXT MESSAGES TO VOTERS**

**To get started go to: [tpp.us/txt](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU0LWE2N2E2Mzk3Yzg3ZDQwNDQ5NWQwOGU4ODUzNjkzMjRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3RleHQydm90ZS90ZXh0Lz9taWQ9NDMxNDgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=XA1rmiPfz7lQmsWNlVfLWA)**– fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging.

**You will get a text message after you’ve signed up.** Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text.

If you need additional instructions [you can look through this guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU0LWE2N2E2Mzk3Yzg3ZDQwNDQ5NWQwOGU4ODUzNjkzMjRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%&K=yPsrPrUTdu1rf7hcGUnAXA). But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET.

**SEND LETTERS & CALL VOTERS**

If you’d like to send letters or call voters, [please sign up using this form,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU0LWE2N2E2Mzk3Yzg3ZDQwNDQ5NWQwOGU4ODUzNjkzMjRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvaXgzaUJUSHRYYjlQRzdyeDY_bWlkPTQzMTQ4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=fPTOhXHGiiPT8yJMHPPE6Q) and we will contact you to get you started.

We cannot Save America and Secure the Senate without you, so please sign up to help Get Out The Vote today!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth
|
---
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU0LWE2N2E2Mzk3Yzg3ZDQwNDQ5NWQwOGU4ODUzNjkzMjRk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kP21pZD00MzE0OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=618QpnYTStuwlelXIh7Krw)

clean_body: | | America needs volunteers to Save America and Secure the Senate now! If Democrats win the two Senate runoff races in Georgia, they will control the Senate. This simply cannot be allowed to happen. The election is on January 5th, but Georgia is already sending out absentee ballots – the same kinds of ballots that were the cause of the election fraud in the Presidential election! The good news is that you can help Get Out The Vote (GOTV) for the Senate runoff races in Georgia from anywhere in the country! There are three ways you can volunteer. You can print out and send letters to voters (we have a prewritten letter you can use), you can text message voters, and you can call voters. See below for details on how to sign up for each activity. Newt Gingrich recently said that Republicans have to turn out more votes than Stacey Abrams can steal, and that’s where you can help. By reaching as many likely Republican voters as possible, we can turn out enough votes to stop the Democrats from stealing these two Senate seats. If we fail, and they are able to steal or win these seats legitimately, and Joe Biden is allowed to steal the Presidency, then the Democrats will have total control over the entire federal government. This means court packing, statehood for Puerto Rico and D.C. (which means four new Democrat Senators), the Green New Deal, socialized medicine, giving America away to China, and more. You and I must stop all of that from happening. Will you join the fight and volunteer to Save American and Secure the Senate? SEND TEXT MESSAGES TO VOTERS To get started go to: – fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging. You will get a text message after you’ve signed up. Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text. If you need additional instructions . But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET. SEND LETTERS & CALL VOTERS If you’d like to send letters or call voters, and we will contact you to get you started. We cannot Save America and Secure the Senate without you, so please sign up to help Get Out The Vote today! In liberty, Jenny Beth | PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. © 2020 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Suite 116-328 Woodstock, GA 30189 |

\------Begin forwarded message------ Subject: CNN's "Cult" Caucus From: Matt Gaetz <[info@mattgaetz.com](mailto:info@mattgaetz.com)> Date: Tuesday, December 15, 2020 at 5:42 PM
Matt,
Recently on Fake News CNN, my colleagues and I were named to the network's "Cult Caucus," all for being a loyal defender of President Trump.
They see this as a shot at me, but I am extremely proud to defend our amazing President and fight for his policies that work for the American people first.
CNN is only trying to divide us as they create "enemies" of the liberal elite who watch their channel. They will lie to their audience and censor stories that hurt Democrats, all while saying they are "defenders of democracy." They are the enemy of the people, and their lies and division of our country must stop.
---

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: SENATOR LOEFFLER RELEASES OPEN LETTER TO THE JEWISH COMMUNITY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|

---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, DECEMBER 19, 2020
SENATOR LOEFFLER RELEASES OPEN LETTER TO THE JEWISH COMMUNITY
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler released the following open letter to the Jewish community after a number of prominent Jewish rabbis [came forward](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v35CiEmfFfN7Iz5xfxmqgejopl1O4wJUc1UCqYrP2Ge5UUvWlGUy2m9lwkwuFEUiyEYe5LYy833q6kV6KO0u0nBel6A5928TdL2EOFgPe-hGax5HVgmdSsUFna0rApwqw9_3rdF4ze53M4trSjWcFFZ3oiZxJ8OfNbGRCqYDPXYZPveqipe9PZwiObr5JNeVT0yKzGGo6dNpeFxt8E6ZZi-ceqGQIGnfOJVLfaOXwsZGxjkp8Qe_eA==&c=tLk0Xse-0PQho8Zn_9hSpF5CyOAqKgjZsowxlIutSvgSfLX1ZmqdCA==&ch=_8GKvI8YbTEI-v7q3jAFZvSUjGoZ2zL0SQdKb-DZ24FwBHMxK7VS7Q==) yesterday condemning Raphael Warnock's history of anti-Israel comments.
When Governor Kemp appointed me to serve in the U.S. Senate, I promised to bring my experience in the business world to deliver real results for the people of Georgia. And over the past eleven months, I have delivered on that promise. In Washington, I have worked to spur economic growth and create jobs, deliver targeted relief to Georgia families throughout COVID-19, and ensure school choice for parents across our state. I have done everything in my power to protect innocent life, our Constitutional rights, safety and security, and America's strength on a world stage. And one of my most important priorities from the start has been to stand with our country's strongest ally - Israel.
Over the last year, I have supported our President's decision to move the U.S. Embassy to Jerusalem, supported the Iranian arms embargo, voted to send more defense dollars to Israel, and vocally condemned anti-Semitism in our country - particularly with the Boycott, Divest, and Sanction movement. But during my time in our nation's capital, I have also seen so-called leaders on the far-Left - like Rashida Talib and Ilhan Omar, who routinely attack the nation of Israel and disparage the Jewish people. Their rhetoric, including calling Israel "evil" and demanding the dissolution of the Jewish state, has no place in America - let alone in Congress.
If elected, my opponent, Raphael Warnock, would add yet another voice to the anti-Israel cadre in Congress - posing a significant threat not only to America's longstanding relationship with Israel, but to Jewish communities across our country.
Warnock is the most radically liberal candidate anywhere in the country, with a shocking history of supporting anti-Semites and spouting anti-Israel rhetoric. He signed a resolution calling for an end to all U.S. military aid to Israel. He has called the nation of Israel an "oppressive regime" reminiscent of an "apartheid state." He has condemned Israel for defending itself, accusing Israelis of "shooting down Palestinians like birds of prey." He has openly supported anti-Israel pastor Jeremiah Wright, and even welcomed the support of CAIR, an anti-Israel hate group.
Inflammatory positions like these are exactly why we've seen an exponential rise in anti-Semitic attacks across this nation over the last few years - and I won't stand for it.
Unlike my opponent, I will always support the nation of Israel and its right to self-determination. I will always be a voice for Georgia's Jewish community and all Americans' right to religious freedom. And I will always oppose radicals like Raphael Warnock whose disdain for Israel imperils the lives and livelihoods of the Jewish faithful across this nation.
Georgians need a common-sense businessperson and conservative outsider in the United States Senate to defend the Constitution - and support our country's strongest ally. On January 5th, or now during early voting, I would be honored to earn your vote.
To view the full letter, click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v35CiEmfFfN7Iz5xfxmqgejopl1O4wJUc1UCqYrP2Ge5UUvWlGUy2m9lwkwuFEUiGq1P4tQ4-5uV7oG3kEKP1MY7oqF0Q-jUTZBBOzQtVHSRbD2IiEVKi1Glv3EoHQAbJ9YBNsa61fsqGIyE45Ii2yKnwAhYvKFzVIHUthWSLWLSVthqgT7IN-A0lp54eyQLzZuDoCdI95oIHFdqegYfu7zCK8UqIzUeaYCm0Rk2qbU=&c=tLk0Xse-0PQho8Zn_9hSpF5CyOAqKgjZsowxlIutSvgSfLX1ZmqdCA==&ch=_8GKvI8YbTEI-v7q3jAFZvSUjGoZ2zL0SQdKb-DZ24FwBHMxK7VS7Q==).
### Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v35CiEmfFfN7Iz5xfxmqgejopl1O4wJUc1UCqYrP2Ge5UUvWlGUy2mPoP91P16y79h2epKjAp0Lc-0usFPp-HF7AEHoem8T5eEo--PvTS9QnrDr76slJh4KL83PUF9DIoUEnPaMpzPgAm-IIgiayN5jLGsjlfx-9&c=tLk0Xse-0PQho8Zn_9hSpF5CyOAqKgjZsowxlIutSvgSfLX1ZmqdCA==&ch=_8GKvI8YbTEI-v7q3jAFZvSUjGoZ2zL0SQdKb-DZ24FwBHMxK7VS7Q==)
---
|

name: Stop the Shutdown Petition
subject: “1-in-4 Small Businesses at Risk of Closing Doors” -- Yahoo News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Thousands of small businesses have already closed their doors for good. Now thousands more are at risk -- destroying innumerable jobs, weakening our economy, and making it that much harder for Americans to make ends meet. It's time for America to open for businesses.

**FIRST:** The Democrats spent $11 million against us.

**THEN:** We defeated Pelosi's Far Left Candidate and _he_[ _immediately_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rnnMtbyZGmp1UnNizGxe9NWZ_hLSMUdJehjH_n_kE8_FfNuEoGkhtd2KG62vg7DHWmrjYJx0RKMuMTw950aAtPob4UOAdwJpUBK5GsQ4k-V2KjvNST7izYuTaIAWa0qz2rge1FoxcN0s83clt8TQ9Im80eA_z9VT7YmJzX9Ww9dcqK491NzCC9yhMb0xsHfpSRd3Mp1ZMSS_6HXhmTWWCVn4IFRGih0oA8mWzW6AGJWsVQK7janH8wTAlYTfI4gh5XMgYA3ag6LGLTcBCkC08EEl1cmMMbm2F9WKkLxfnRm0NqLIHwfJvP1XACyiRDwWmylnh2VA1qDE7tTl8ZbSR9iYEpaSRPhbAOw8oK0zgFGsZFne4ajPvpBXp9pvKbSHt4PojtV3A2lBqopnftWlPtcGLNLIOydk8GCtvgPveOM0OiYs28jmnYIMAaE85QWP_X0WvK9Lve_8wddAQZtU3rRx4DXVsApg&c=w1734EgVtgvzssF5b9qYGVQJcEuv613gsCfyoQDZNEXtaxKf5XbhnA==&ch=p41dczbrT7GblTYksBlnDwlhiDk807WTXXhSgME-ByxFh1x212MJ3w==) _declared a rematch._

**NOW:** Far-Left Harley Rouda is blaming his loss on a lack of resources and is determined to spend millions more attacking us.

**Friend, I need you to understand just how important this is:** despite outspending us 3:1, despite spending more dark money against us than any other race in the country, despite flooding this district with Pelosi's PAC dollars, _Harley Rouda and the Democrats are preparing to spend untold millions more misleading voters, distorting Michelle 's record, and buying this seat outright._

THEN: We defeated Pelosi's Far Left Candidate and he== declared a rematch. NOW: Far-Left Harley Rouda is blaming his loss on a lack of resources and is determined to spend millions more attacking us. Friend, I need you to understand just how important this is: despite outspending us 3:1, despite spending more dark money against us than any other race in the country, despite flooding this district with Pelosi's PAC dollars, Harley Rouda and the Democrats are preparing to spend untold millions more misleading voters, distorting Michelle 's record, and buying this seat outright. If we 're to compete with the Democrats' dark money machine and Pelosi's deep pockets, we have to start now. == There are only a handful of seats as important as this one and with Pelosi's Majority hanging on by a thread this is our one shot to take back the House for Republicans. == | ==** Thank you, Caeli Team Steel == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: John Kasich
subject: We made a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
When I look back at these past few years, I'm proud of the work we did to put our country first before our political party loyalty. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=74af9853590a4a5186903b275a76db41&_e=--RyrHu_hSGtntOWk_ETscBRhNXih-gMSE5yr1xAW8DBJ2zS2f-KUuG-AISXsiPEnYzXaPMgDB157OrqROgyv2SHSDj9946jY6EYMn1BlAbOdAwbDhMgZEHYfQAiUZTxUeE22VKeyZYwOZ_-FvYMZD14snijERoN0fbJsW4sB5k34SW-T8m_WT00uEu9tJD90v-RMGFR7SMhic8-NSXa80t_O8hQ1uFxRHrnZ-4GbCLBjwUiBZIUadDr81b5MFKg61Jl1muZLnbIEqSglAaNlA%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - when I look back at these past few years, I'm proud of the work we did to put our country first before our political party loyalty. Together, we made a real difference, and I can't thank you enough for being a part of this team.

When some leaders worked to divide us, we were there calling for unity and purpose. When they threatened our nation's vital institutions, we were there to fight for them. And when they've threatened our democracy, we were there to stand in their way.

I remain a Republican but I also acknowledge that perhaps, like you, I didn't leave the Party; the Party left me. Despite all this, it remains my hope that perhaps with new leaders the GOP can step away from the ledge and once again offer a positive, compassionate vision for the future of America.

**It's time for the Republican Party to again become a party of ideas**. What is our plan on healthcare? On the environment? On racial divisions? On the national debt and many other critical issues? Ideas create the energy that drives positive change, and we seem to have lost sight of that.

**As we look ahead to 2021 and a new chapter in America, I will be there calling it like I see it and doing everything I can to inspire positive change**. As I've long said, it's up to each of us to make a positive difference where we live - to lift others when we can and heal our nation together.

But I'll need your ongoing support to carry this message and ensure we're able to make an impact. You may have donated to our cause before or maybe not at all, but [I'm asking you to consider making a donation to this effort](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=74af9853590a4a5186903b275a76db41&_e=--RyrHu_hSGtntOWk_ETseGKh2wArI3IABQcCVdpk-W_6EzTJvCpNdF5vKGATafTK2EuiDRWvlKGiUJY6sbv1QG1OUpq3msgshwH8Qjlio8oqImoHNZyDeFfv8pnjhojTsPMR0Nz-3riy3ReRhRHgVqCSYoOSyAzahL9zuvYhNGbwHA5ENkxzt23M7Nl5QP5dh9_1HVIad3W6hvOI8Nbs-wxGa69maRh7WD0PbhuqCsVgmYDn0oJP6ogX0oiKKOraxVNRiUrEBx5XQIgqZt5TQ%3D%3D) before our end-of-the-year deadline so we have the funds to continue this fight in 2021.

**Any amount you're able to give will make a difference and I couldn't be any more thankful for your support**.
[Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=74af9853590a4a5186903b275a76db41&_e=--RyrHu_hSGtntOWk_ETseGKh2wArI3IABQcCVdpk-W_6EzTJvCpNdF5vKGATafTWvKYIqC53fO5Kin0DIp2WpfV_l8dDYwELf-hTJcJzEUuWZBVq4N4FLNDwN25DaqHS1I4xEWQTAH9uARbKqLQ4uqtUb6ETmq1GKYufCraEjwCv9cduItjKLZVJzv99Wmh1fQF-t6cL6QX1U5RNdcIVzPjFOEyOMz8oAQFNXzbkErdkicYwAogmGpohEa91lRjYBIsaI71jsLAAy1bYF7IKg%3D%3D)
There are brighter days ahead for America and I'm excited to see how we can continue this journey together.

Wishing you and your family the happiest of holiday celebrations and a joyful New Year!

-John
|
---

| [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=74af9853590a4a5186903b275a76db41&_e=--RyrHu_hSGtntOWk_ETsU0JFQNJkfayBNBqBVjDIEFHm_lCxvJp_IvqI-g211Uf2Pq0YMBNbRkcvxlpa4MYVE7RyfGYvZL1HbE5Fbb12v_8ssrVxY_Bdh9ViTgMWzcEh8R1XE-SUW0qIdXM1xlNRS4q_yfVnRs8Tt4_3XF2wvcChfJ30nqob07GSnw1gn-zLZYpCrZcNfYbu0tJJrp4iURmLqM4K0O5S9Jrew2_aAGyYi0Xc8fnnmopOE8DeqolltLeb3RO1LNDgzTgZcduxw%3D%3D) | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=74af9853590a4a5186903b275a76db41&_e=--RyrHu_hSGtntOWk_ETsWJ_jPYwjbX_owMzn5Z9xqHreeim3oYVpudiRhpH9nbQBdF86peOKBUll2k7wc2aCYKBhh4ceZCNcFBhLsnPxEXCOCRSz3E5MttzOhAei1dGXc8KDCAMxZ8z0AJ2qCQb2_ylx9jI2wM2jQG8vrhbX1fLdVsUZ6lh7ubQ3jq84bQhobzhcde4JejV4QJTujpDsgTrRtZ8Uu8TCjcAMgvMJEJj3GvZwRYp1Ng1ILc3NNqozLh3rhqPwhLx6I62KpvHSA%3D%3D) | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=74af9853590a4a5186903b275a76db41&_e=KlcEICAdMoesiuM4vpnsjAilioIRvpUQVv_35mScq7ZTOud_NKr-CQYGDZij_zu8YyTf2_Y197O3-kmFG4ZaMJKXfOlJzQjXMnTO6HASKZYuoV2HhsWMiX96U8Zwl8ovHnmYAvUVje-11SrNpIFPxyPKSslITJ4LQvZCp8UIqzA9KYfs2WkIRf2fGmJvLeOHfqLMRuomL7J_jZdSvqWdj8OiX966F0j7Ggu1BxzW2Pdj29ij6epfiyxfVn5I8wokyWUwkEW4UUNk_CrJ4XCl1Q%3D%3D) | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=74af9853590a4a5186903b275a76db41&_e=--RyrHu_hSGtntOWk_ETsQIbWRRgZwEb4vc61CejuI7Vd2qzQphg818xTCvn98xDyosuM_h28GXF_9CeWGkvf2-Pr--xbtOOhoXOUqDOimLigrxoFXxZSMEzNc3JVxQ4Cebfwxb046PNZ_RTSSxvyJnxd2zukSDQBPahZFXSyTyIJwdiVHGLPqLqBfc9X7Gznv9l6S2nHQUYkoHWsDlB81FJg57cc7GvMIOTabY1X4m1MBYUyMqao7LaqRQcs-pdITPSjsUXr5bG-HRj8_zKPA%3D%3D)

name: Team Warner
subject: Your weekly update.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d978/53d9897e/55369adf/1c88d6c9/330630983/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

We hope this email finds you and your family safe and healthy. Team Warner is committed to sending these updates to make sure that folks are up to date on Senator Mark Warner's work and priorities in the Senate.

**Here 's the latest:**
* Mark continues to work with Senate colleagues on both sides of the aisle to **[negotiate interim coronavirus relief](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d978/53d9897e/55369adf/1c88d6c8/330630983/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.nbc12.com/2020/12/17/warner-kaine-say-relief-package-isnt-perfect-promises-urgent-aid/")**. With millions of Americans facing eviction or the loss of unemployment benefits early in the new year, he is determined to get this bridge package across the finish line before the holiday recess. This bi-partisan bridge package would help people get through the next few months before we can begin rebuilding our economy under the Biden administration.
* **[Mark met virtually with leaders in Southwest Virginia to discuss surging coronavirus cases in the area.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d978/53d9897e/55369adf/1c88d637/330630983/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wjhl.com/news/sen-mark-warner-health-officials-address-surge-of-covid-19-cases-in-southwest-virginia/")** Mark is calling for a public education campaign to make sure that every Virginian knows that the vaccine is safe and effective, and called on social media platforms to combat misinformation about the vaccine and vaccine development.
* **[Mark continues to work to expand affordable broadband access to every corner of the Commonwealth](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d978/53d9897e/55369adf/1c88d636/330630983/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wvtf.org/post/rural-virginia-county-pioneers-satellite-broadband#stream/0")** , especially during unprecedented demand for telework, distance learning, and telehealth during the coronavirus pandemic. He is working with local leaders in Wise County who are working to serve students in need of internet access using low orbit satellites.
* Mark praised the Virginia Commission for Historical Statues' recommendation that the **[Robert E. Lee statue in the U.S. Capitol be replaced with one of Barbara Johns, a civil rights leader from Prince Edward County](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d978/53d9897e/55369adf/1c88d635/330630983/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://fcnp.com/2020/12/17/sen-warner-comments-on-move-to-replace-lee-statue-with-barbara-johns/")** who fought against school segregation and poor educational conditions. As governor, Mark led the effort to honor Johns with a statue on the Capitol grounds in Richmond.
* Mark was honored by the National Park Foundation for his work in **[passing the bi-partisan _Great American Outdoors Act_](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d978/53d9897e/55369adf/1c88d634/330630983/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://starexponent.com/news/mark-warner-honored-by-national-parks-advocates-for-leadership-on-great-american-outdoors-act/article_48f2268f-cbfb-5edc-9c19-22090c6b56c3.html")** , a historic investment in the National Parks Service that will support 100,000 jobs in Virginia alone. Mark also **[met virtually with the new superintendent of Shenandoah National Park](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d978/53d9897e/55369adf/1c88d633/330630983/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/mark-warner-talks-strategy-with-new-shenandoah-national-park-superintendent/")** to discuss park strategy in 2021 and beyond.

Thank you for your continued support!

Be well,
Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d978/53d9897e/55369adf/1c88d632/330630983/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk1OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201219_e_1_fl__958__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

[**Kelly needs your help to keep up - will you rush a 6X MATCHED donation to ensure we keep the Senate red?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UotyjcxCTg9RsaonTu29KHVfQlkbSUR9fZ6c4c1SQlk44HpdmaGiKHstPVI_VHsE3sBAvz3KnIqhZPPxzf4nUalyxQRpavgV48OnabaKv2AmSwlqAKyh7_tAT9OLckcrkajx_s51XsYFCQWkNIO6N_FMoxSPCo-gDYPgAUP_dxLTr0U51dTIJviSdv3P0ZAjBp-kiSyFxO18Sb3yAVvQ7d6oHiTlan91Ld0GCovYHd7oyST3hTuTyHu3X53V6BRziqwXZPwYugyzfMEPMr3bGt5eujMcQeSJgZwmQxznK07WseJLrUmvWD_IGQgNMUz527RENmicWSINJzsAw5lT7kPwKFkHuAp4j_LKLKCv7sp3Og7c6M-j6Yu6-YIl2De25ainN8awBHY=&c=N_P0LTeVQA1I8OD7OA2qSRMzg019twwDWfF8XxTX5dc3RS-T1NbllQ==&ch=6DDr77Nq3BNm1NGuI-qu9zSChuhgj_ny8QsZgaFXw9_8fozM9KhMVA==)

body:

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Your feedback makes a difference
body:
| | Peter, Your feedback is invaluable to us. After the November elections, we asked you to take our post-election survey. We are grateful for the thousands who did. We learned so much but we have developed a supplemental survey to better understand which resources were most helpful and what you would like to see provided in the future. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2yQBg2Z6VDfSi_FbhxUGr-UNjPMRV4aTWK9r1IYi7BAPczF2B14VEJrfNho3J6MpOOejGBVYRh3jxPfiVOvZpfwHH_pMLl6LzsXUw9rMMqFqA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201219srv01&n=1) [Please take our quick two-question survey](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2yQBg2Z6VDfSi_FbhxUGr-UNjPMRV4aTWK9r1IYi7BAPczF2B14VEJrfNho3J6MpOOejGBVYRh3jxPfiVOvZpfwHH_pMLl6LzsXUw9rMMqFqA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201219srv01&n=2 "Take The Survey") and let us know which resources were most beneficial for you. Your answers will not only help us serve you better but also reach and activate other Christians across the nation. We have tremendous work before us to protect and advance biblical values at the local, state, and federal levels. Your insight will strengthen our efforts to equip more Christians to pray, think biblically, and vote in every election. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2yQBg2Z6VDfSi_FbhxUGr-UNjPMRV4aTWK9r1IYi7BAPczF2B14VEJrfNho3J6MpOOejGBVYRh3jxPfiVOvZpfwHH_pMLl6LzsXUw9rMMqFqA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201219srv01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201219srv01&n=4)

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: NEW AD: HERSCHEL WALKER URGES GEORGIANS TO VOTE FOR SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SATURDAY, DECEMBER 19, 2020
NEW AD: HERSCHEL WALKER URGES GEORGIANS TO VOTE FOR SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler released a new ad titled, "[Toss](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ti6ptwbWW7lS362-KeaklVZ-WSriqXvEUxlH7f5QQsEGp55BWOliixHe7-3H3XO5eqc6_GDEQxy4aqu9Y8B_G-Hj8pnZ4x_PBWJ2N0gg7dUQs4sJ0nzEUTLa-eW7aLw_IrKEqDlpebMKbhqV6-o7EUK0lSyU4Y0ZMhw494eL8_ACT5fqe7rw1Y7ro3jfi1XXtS6Jwyr42FQ=&c=bf4hntcrKj_SMDnicMzNf6O2EU7XuIf3Fwwmb_lHHcj2vx9MwCX51w==&ch=miXnR-C8pC4_ZMJLsYbI-z6Wl0opbyrvEYkgTU_IKBl31dmPQiLjtw==)," highlighting her support from UGA Heisman Trophy winner and National Championship football player, Herschel Walker. Walker's status as one of - if not the- greatest college football players of all time has made him a household name in Georgia. And he's urging all Georgians to get out and vote for Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue to stop socialism and save our country.
Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ti6ptwbWW7lS362-KeaklVZ-WSriqXvEUxlH7f5QQsEGp55BWOliixHe7-3H3XO5eqc6_GDEQxy4aqu9Y8B_G-Hj8pnZ4x_PBWJ2N0gg7dUQs4sJ0nzEUTLa-eW7aLw_IrKEqDlpebMKbhqV6-o7EUK0lSyU4Y0ZMhw494eL8_ACT5fqe7rw1Y7ro3jfi1XXtS6Jwyr42FQ=&c=bf4hntcrKj_SMDnicMzNf6O2EU7XuIf3Fwwmb_lHHcj2vx9MwCX51w==&ch=miXnR-C8pC4_ZMJLsYbI-z6Wl0opbyrvEYkgTU_IKBl31dmPQiLjtw==) or on the photo below to view the ad:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ti6ptwbWW7lS362-KeaklVZ-WSriqXvEUxlH7f5QQsEGp55BWOliixHe7-3H3XO5eqc6_GDEQxy4aqu9Y8B_G-Hj8pnZ4x_PBWJ2N0gg7dUQs4sJ0nzEUTLa-eW7aLw_IrKEqDlpebMKbhqV6-o7EUK0lSyU4Y0ZMhw494eL8_ACT5fqe7rw1Y7ro3jfi1XXtS6Jwyr42FQ=&c=bf4hntcrKj_SMDnicMzNf6O2EU7XuIf3Fwwmb_lHHcj2vx9MwCX51w==&ch=miXnR-C8pC4_ZMJLsYbI-z6Wl0opbyrvEYkgTU_IKBl31dmPQiLjtw==)

| View the transcript of the ad below:
HERSCHEL: I'm Herschel Walker. With everything on the line here in Georgia, I know who I'm giving the ball to.
KELLY: This is about saving America from socialism and protecting the freedoms that make us great.
DAVID: If the radicals take total control, we'll never get our country back.
HERSCHEL: Too much is at stake. Vote Kelly and David. Help Georgia win this for America.
### Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ti6ptwbWW7lS362-KeaklVZ-WSriqXvEUxlH7f5QQsEGp55BWOlii7DHedweX0iD-MB9mqegmPjyo_BBSpq3gz8Wde9XDYU8CltFK4VPV27gsTu_zw9G0BEIrl5074TkXcmPI7EgU2qWd8bCNO0of4Zc5nQKzX_G&c=bf4hntcrKj_SMDnicMzNf6O2EU7XuIf3Fwwmb_lHHcj2vx9MwCX51w==&ch=miXnR-C8pC4_ZMJLsYbI-z6Wl0opbyrvEYkgTU_IKBl31dmPQiLjtw==)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Petition: Tell the Senate to consider challenges to electoral votes!
body:
| |
---
|
---
Please [read and sign this petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU0LTM2MWY4Zjg1YjQ4MjQ5NDU5N2EwZTk1NDRlZmJkYzE0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWlyZWxlY3Rpb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDMxNDkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=kj9uXWNl4o1st8u7CIAOeg) to the Senate to urge them keep an open mind about challenges to contested states’ electoral votes.

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU0LTM2MWY4Zjg1YjQ4MjQ5NDU5N2EwZTk1NDRlZmJkYzE0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWlyZWxlY3Rpb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDMxNDkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=t3HZEDGxp9PyULp4yBRKog)

Once you’ve signed it, make sure to share it on social media and email it out to your network.

Right now, some members of the Senate have already said they won’t consider challenges to these states’ electoral votes, even though there are still court cases from President Trump’s campaign moving through the courts.

President Trump and the American people deserve due process, and we need to remind the Senate they need to respect that due process.

Make sure to [sign the petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzU0LTM2MWY4Zjg1YjQ4MjQ5NDU5N2EwZTk1NDRlZmJkYzE0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWlyZWxlY3Rpb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDMxNDkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=DYO8O03z9JHQgANSVAK5ZQ) and then share it!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

Friend, Nancy Pelosi has set her sights on California's 39th Congressional District -- _a seat we only recently flipped from BLUE to RED after defying the odds and proving pollsters, pundits, and the media wrong. _

After spending tens of millions attacking us, she's made it clear she will go to great lengths to buy it out from under us. That means more dark money, more special interests, more high dollar donors, and a major flood of cash. It also means our grassroots team has to be stronger than ever.

**Friend, can Young count on you to fight with us? We can 't defend this seat from the Far Left without you and we certainly can't take back the House without this seat.**

clean_body: We won by only a couple thousand votes. With Pelosi determined to unseat us and claw back the seats she lost, that's too close for comfort. == Friend, Nancy Pelosi has set her sights on California's 39th Congressional District -- a seat we only recently flipped from BLUE to RED after defying the odds and proving pollsters, pundits, and the media wrong. After spending tens of millions attacking us, she's made it clear she will go to great lengths to buy it out from under us. That means more dark money, more special interests, more high dollar donors, and a major flood of cash. It also means our grassroots team has to be stronger than ever. Friend, can Young count on you to fight with us? We can 't defend this seat from the Far Left without you and we certainly can't take back the House without this seat. | | == ** | | == | == | | == | == | | == We won by only a couple thousand votes. In November, we drained our accounts to win by the smallest of margins. With Pelosi determined to unseat us and claw back the seats she lost, that's too close for comfort. So, in order to secure this seat and keep Young in the House, we have to start now. | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == Young Kim is fighting for small businesses, lower taxes, more jobs, affordable healthcare, lower prescription drug prices, and a better, brighter future for all. But right now she needs your help. name: Stephanie Bice
subject: Take a moment to congratulate...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bice for Congress
body:
Despite her narrow majority, Nancy Pelosi's Far Left agenda will not slow down. From a government healthcare takeover to the Green New Deal, all Americans will suffer. But Young Kim and I intend to stop that.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yAQdbGUcInMofDuVb8w53vtodeA0XY7CNSaxnQNxYX51iXDHycUTVoj4X2AopWXEV9IKFaNX8gMKqf6WBLzeiJolz9DOrOJ7Ut12n_fMZuli49xhmHqUutS1bBx5zXPBlVT5OW6Om7IGli-uGLETjekQ6fnzRwzFKulMj4itZqQOQ9HQvB9QdQRdil0BQWdcaEfBGK7XN8hLvf3fedSNQ7M-Y8TGaNa2qPAGVALRl1g7QOhTZG5lqOW5rtumAxntLaKSewiAAlfrPCsTk08vI5CnuRo33iXAt871n37kKRwQK1B0MDJR1A65s2XH-AbQoWaeKBhH5EM--zQ6YIdyqxNOKkMb0kWPsDcc8e_WdaLX3W0bMVaVE0Gh2qifex2pQZvnr8_1YAOGK7FaEN4YbA==&c=dsutDBnqo0a4DlZTXzyUbRcSocxhd1rsnNqZgqT7Jp52BRX1-6oyRQ==&ch=FaD6XNtMYofTU5xoAUKpOJq3WG56wd-FWXYW118SuCe8LvtvWR_NlA==)
Friend, It's no secret that Republican women had a record year in the recent election. Nearly 15 House of Representative seats were flipped from D -> R all across the country. My friend and fellow Congresswoman-elect Young Kim from California's 39th district, won an impressive race against her Democrat opponent. **I look forward to working alongside her in Congress when we are sworn in on January 3rd.** Together, with the help of many other newly elected Republican women and GOP leaders, we will strengthen our job market, economy, improve care for our veterans, reform our education system, lower taxes, and much more. Friend, will you take a moment to congratulate Young Kim and other newly elected conservative women on our victory, and help us take on the far Left in Congress? **[**STAND WITH STEPHANIE AND YOUNG**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yAQdbGUcInMofDuVb8w53vtodeA0XY7CNSaxnQNxYX51iXDHycUTVoj4X2AopWXEV9IKFaNX8gMKqf6WBLzeiJolz9DOrOJ7Ut12n_fMZuli49xhmHqUutS1bBx5zXPBlVT5OW6Om7IGli-uGLETjekQ6fnzRwzFKulMj4itZqQOQ9HQvB9QdQRdil0BQWdcaEfBGK7XN8hLvf3fedSNQ7M-Y8TGaNa2qPAGVALRl1g7QOhTZG5lqOW5rtumAxntLaKSewiAAlfrPCsTk08vI5CnuRo33iXAt871n37kKRwQK1B0MDJR1A65s2XH-AbQoWaeKBhH5EM--zQ6YIdyqxNOKkMb0kWPsDcc8e_WdaLX3W0bMVaVE0Gh2qifex2pQZvnr8_1YAOGK7FaEN4YbA==&c=dsutDBnqo0a4DlZTXzyUbRcSocxhd1rsnNqZgqT7Jp52BRX1-6oyRQ==&ch=FaD6XNtMYofTU5xoAUKpOJq3WG56wd-FWXYW118SuCe8LvtvWR_NlA==)** _**SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE WOMEN**_ Despite her narrow majority, Nancy Pelosi's Far Left agenda will not slow down. From a government healthcare takeover to the Green New Deal, all Americans will suffer -- _which is why Young and I will stand on a united front against the Far Left, fighting for hardworking Americans._ **[**STAND WITH STEPHANIE AND YOUNG**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yAQdbGUcInMofDuVb8w53vtodeA0XY7CNSaxnQNxYX51iXDHycUTVoj4X2AopWXEV9IKFaNX8gMKqf6WBLzeiJolz9DOrOJ7Ut12n_fMZuli49xhmHqUutS1bBx5zXPBlVT5OW6Om7IGli-uGLETjekQ6fnzRwzFKulMj4itZqQOQ9HQvB9QdQRdil0BQWdcaEfBGK7XN8hLvf3fedSNQ7M-Y8TGaNa2qPAGVALRl1g7QOhTZG5lqOW5rtumAxntLaKSewiAAlfrPCsTk08vI5CnuRo33iXAt871n37kKRwQK1B0MDJR1A65s2XH-AbQoWaeKBhH5EM--zQ6YIdyqxNOKkMb0kWPsDcc8e_WdaLX3W0bMVaVE0Gh2qifex2pQZvnr8_1YAOGK7FaEN4YbA==&c=dsutDBnqo0a4DlZTXzyUbRcSocxhd1rsnNqZgqT7Jp52BRX1-6oyRQ==&ch=FaD6XNtMYofTU5xoAUKpOJq3WG56wd-FWXYW118SuCe8LvtvWR_NlA==)** **_SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE WOMEN_** With your help, Young and I can take on the Left in Washington, D.C. and prioritize delivering COVID-19 relief bills, aiding small businesses and families, and fighting against dangerous Democratic policies. Thank you for your commitment to the conservative movement. I look forward to serving you with Young Kim and many other impressive conservative leaders in January.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yAQdbGUcInMofDuVb8w53vtodeA0XY7CNSaxnQNxYX51iXDHycUTVoj4X2AopWXEV9IKFaNX8gMKqf6WBLzeiJolz9DOrOJ7Ut12n_fMZuli49xhmHqUutS1bBx5zXPBlVT5OW6Om7IGli-uGLETjekQ6fnzRwzFKulMj4itZqQOQ9HQvB9QdQRdil0BQWdcaEfBGK7XN8hLvf3fedSNQ7M-Y8TGaNa2qPAGVALRl1g7QOhTZG5lqOW5rtumAxntLaKSewiAAlfrPCsTk08vI5CnuRo33iXAt871n37kKRwQK1B0MDJR1A65s2XH-AbQoWaeKBhH5EM--zQ6YIdyqxNOKkMb0kWPsDcc8e_WdaLX3W0bMVaVE0Gh2qifex2pQZvnr8_1YAOGK7FaEN4YbA==&c=dsutDBnqo0a4DlZTXzyUbRcSocxhd1rsnNqZgqT7Jp52BRX1-6oyRQ==&ch=FaD6XNtMYofTU5xoAUKpOJq3WG56wd-FWXYW118SuCe8LvtvWR_NlA==) -- Stephanie Bice

clean_body: Stephanie Bice is a proven GOP leader. &zwnj == == Friend, Republican women made history this year. There are more Republican women elected to Congress than ever before, and 10 of us fought hard to flip our districts red! I am proud to be heading to Washington with this remarkable group, including Stephanie Bice of Oklahoma's 5th district. Like me, Stephanie is a proven conservative leader who first served in her state legislature before running to represent her district in D.C. We both won tough races against established and well-funded Democratic opponents, and we are looking forward to representing our shared values in Congress. == **== == I could not be more thrilled to head to Congress with women like Stephanie, who are proud to fight for conservative values and to protect the Constitution. This election proved that Americans do NOT want the far-left agenda that Democrats in Congress support. Thanks to supporters like you, we have shown the far-left that they can no longer get away with wrongly labeling female Republicans as "anti-women." == == == Stephanie and I will never stop fighting to make sure you are heard in Congress. We are ready to tackle the tough issues that face America with common sense solutions. == ==** Thank You, Ashley Hinson | PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
Friend, I'm on the ground in Georgia and Kelly Loeffler is WAY short of her goal.

She is up against one of the most radical candidates we've ever seen. If Democrats are able to put Raphael Warnock in the Senate, nothing will be able to stop them from enacting their socialist agenda in our country. Raphael Warnock has a long relationship with socialism. He's been known to praise Marxism, has ties to Fidel Castro, and is a close confidant to Stacey Abrams. These threats are REAL and they can't be ignored.

**Warnock calls himself a "pro-choice pastor" and will be quick to support any radical abortion laws the Democrats propose in the Senate. **

I can't express to you enough that our country's ENTIRE FUTURE is on the line. Everything hangs in the balance, Friend and we can't afford to have any patriots sit this one out.
